creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-i386->gavin

To submitter:  Firstly, I'm really sorry that this PR has taken so 
long to look at.  I wonder, are you able to recreate the issue with 
more recent versions of FreeBSD?  If your drive is still not recognised, 
would you be willing to assist in some minor debugging?  Thanks!
